scripts.build: pnpm build:library && pnpm build:examples && pnpm check:example-cli
scripts.build:examples: pnpm --filter @flow-state/launch-workspace build && pnpm --filter @flow-state/basic-cached-posts build && pnpm --filter @flow-state/optimistic-transactions build && pnpm --filter @flow-state/bounded-infinite-feed build && pnpm --filter @flow-state/server-prefetch-hydration build && pnpm --filter @flow-state/offline-recovery build && pnpm --filter @flow-state/incident-console build
scripts.build:library: pnpm --filter flow-state build && pnpm --filter flow-state check:typescript-mode-proofs && pnpm --filter flow-state check:packed-consumers
scripts.verify: pnpm check && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm test:browser && pnpm docs:build
